name: EventHandler - SuppressionConstruct
description: Verify SuppressionConstruct EventHandler loads and can be read

steps.name: Search for construct with SuppressionConstruct handler
steps.code: var found = false; var constructs = Menace.SDK.Templates.FindAll("ConstructTemplate"); foreach(var constructName in constructs) { var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty("ConstructTemplate", constructName, "EventHandlers"); if(handlers != null) { foreach(var h in (System.Collections.IEnumerable)handlers) { if(h.GetType().Name == "SuppressionConstruct") { found = true; break; } } if(found) break; } } found

steps.name: Load EventHandlers from a specific construct
Verify _type field readable
steps.code: var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty("ConstructTemplate", "construct.security_camera", "EventHandlers"); var found = false; if(handlers != null) { foreach(var h in (System.Collections.IEnumerable)handlers) { var typeField = h.GetType().GetField("_type"); if(typeField != null) { found = true; break; } } } found

steps.name: Read PinnedDownText parameter field from SuppressionConstruct
steps.code: var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty("ConstructTemplate", "construct.security_camera", "EventHandlers"); var found = false; if(handlers != null) { foreach(var h in (System.Collections.IEnumerable)handlers) { if(h.GetType().Name == "SuppressionConstruct") { var field = h.GetType().GetField("PinnedDownText"); if(field != null) { found = true; break; } } } } found
